chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Giving Respite to the Indebted

text: 1702 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «خَلُّوا سَبِيلَ اَلْمُعْسِرِ كَمَا خَلاَّهُ اَللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1702 - Imam (as) said: "Let the insolvent go free, just as Allah (swt), the Blessed and Exalted, has set him free."
